🎮 PyQuest Gaming Hub

Master coding through interactive games and challenges

🔍

SQL Murder Mystery

Detective

Solve a murder mystery using SQL queries. Query databases, find clues, and identify the killer through data investigation.
🔐

Break The Code

Cryptography

Crack various ciphers and encodings. Solve challenges with Caesar cipher, ROT13, Base64, and more!
🥋

CodeKata

Algorithms

Master algorithms through hands-on coding challenges. Solve problems from easy to hard difficulty levels.
⚙️

CodeCreeps

Real-time Strategy

Write code to control units and complete objectives on a game board. Build AI for your units and manage resources.
🔮

Tech Codex

System Design

Design complex distributed systems. Tackle real-world architecture challenges like URL shorteners and chat applications.

PyQuest © 2024 | Interactive Coding Games Platform

Each game tests different aspects of programming: SQL, Cryptography, Algorithms, Real-time Systems, and Architecture
